judge_reason: Description B quotes multiple specific, structured text elements (e.g., 'Class/Case # 0062 83894', 'Serial # 52', a full declassification authority statement) that Description A does not mention at all, and Description A's claim of stamps in 'red, black, and blue ink' directly contradicts B's specific 'orange letters' and 'red handwritten X'.
original_image_tags: Scan of a worn, tan-colored FBI file jacket or folder cover. The surface is covered with multiple stamps, labels, and annotations in red, black, and blue ink.
gpt_mini_desc: *Image: A scanned manila FBI file folder cover with multiple labels and stamps, including “FEDERAL BUREAU OF INVESTIGATION,” “DO NOT DESTROY,” “SECRET,” “Transfer - Call 3421,” “Use Care in Handling this File,” “Pickett Street,” a barcode label reading “FBI - CENTRAL RECORDS CENTER / HQ-HEADQUARTERS,” and a right-side label marked “SERIALS 1-52” and “SECTION 1.”*
